pages.name: Executive Overview
pages.business_question: Did the company hit the monthly FP&A plan, and what should leadership act on?
sections: Header with reporting month and source freshness
Five KPI cards: Revenue, Gross Margin %, EBITDA, Opex, Cash
12-month Revenue and EBITDA trend
EBITDA variance by business unit
Commentary: What happened, Why, What next
required_interactions: Slicers sync across all report pages
Clicking a business unit filters trend, variance, and commentary context
Drillthrough to Business Unit Deep Dive

pages.name: Variance Bridge
pages.business_question: What explains the movement from Budget EBITDA to Actual EBITDA?
sections: Actual vs Budget KPI strip
Waterfall bridge: Budget EBITDA to Actual EBITDA
Variance matrix by business unit and region
Driver ranking for revenue, margin, and opex
required_interactions: Bridge filters by business unit and region
Matrix supports drill-down from BU to region
Positive variance uses teal and negative variance uses red

pages.name: Business Unit Deep Dive
pages.business_question: Which business units and products are driving performance?
sections: BU KPI cards for Revenue, Gross Margin %, EBITDA %
Revenue and EBITDA trend by scenario
Product profitability matrix
Region contribution bar chart
required_interactions: Tooltip shows Actual, Budget, Forecast, and variance

pages.name: Customer & Product Drilldown
pages.business_question: Which customers and products need commercial action?
sections: Top 10 customer revenue and EBITDA variance
Revenue vs Gross Margin % scatter by customer
Product mix and margin table
Exception table for negative EBITDA variance
required_interactions: Scatter point color uses customer segment

pages.name: Opex & Cash Control
pages.business_question: Are Opex and cash under control versus plan?
sections: Opex, Cash, AR, DSO KPI cards
Opex by department and scenario
Cash balance trend by scenario
DSO and AR balance by business unit
required_interactions: Department filter affects Opex visuals only
Cash visuals use latest-month balance measure
BU and region filters sync with cash and opex facts
